overview.short: St Vincent De Paul Church (SVP) is a Roman Catholic church in Katapady in Udupi district, Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Yenagudde
topPlaces.description: Yenagudde is a census town in Udupi district in the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Udyavara
topPlaces.description: Udyavara is an ancient port village located 5 km south of Udupi in the Indian state of Karnataka. This town is a regional marine industry and fisheries hub.

topPlaces.name: Mattu, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Mattu or Matti is a village in the Udupi district of Karnataka state in India that lies on the shore of the Arabian Sea. This village can be reached from the city of Udupi by taking a right turn at Katapady on the way to Mangalore.

topPlaces.name: Shankarapura
topPlaces.description: Shankarapura a tiny hamlet in Udupi taluk, Karnataka state, India. Situated 3 km east of NH 17 (now NH 66).

topPlaces.name: Kukkikatte
topPlaces.description: Kukkikatte is a place located about 3 km from the city of Udupi in the state of Karnataka, India. It is a suburb of the Udupi City.

topPlaces.name: Pangala
topPlaces.description: Pangala is a village situated in Udupi taluk of Udupi district, Karnataka. India's National Highway number 66 (NH 66) connecting Mangalore (Kudla or Mangaluru) to Mumbai (Bombay) passes through this village.

topPlaces.name: Katapady
topPlaces.description: Katapadi[ Originally called as Bandhanapura ] is a village near Udupi in Karnataka, India. It is situated at the junction of National Highway 66 and the roads leading to Mattu and Shankarapura.

topPlaces.name: Pajaka
topPlaces.description: Pajaka is a village in Udupi Taluk and district of Karnataka state in India. Pajaka is the place where Dvaita philosopher Sri Madhvacharya was born.

items.note: Yenagudde is a census town in Udupi district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
Udyavara is an ancient port village located 5 km south of Udupi in the Indian state of Karnataka. This town is a regional marine industry and fisheries hub.

Mattu or Matti is a village in the Udupi district of Karnataka state in India that lies on the shore of the Arabian Sea. This village can be reached from the city of Udupi by taking a right turn at Katapady on the way to Mangalore.
Shankarapura a tiny hamlet in Udupi taluk, Karnataka state, India. Situated 3 km east of NH 17 (now NH 66).
Kukkikatte is a place located about 3 km from the city of Udupi in the state of Karnataka, India. It is a suburb of the Udupi City.

Pangala is a village situated in Udupi taluk of Udupi district, Karnataka. India's National Highway number 66 (NH 66) connecting Mangalore (Kudla or Mangaluru) to Mumbai (Bombay) passes through this village.
Katapadi[ Originally called as Bandhanapura ] is a village near Udupi in Karnataka, India. It is situated at the junction of National Highway 66 and the roads leading to Mattu and Shankarapura.
Pajaka is a village in Udupi Taluk and district of Karnataka state in India. Pajaka is the place where Dvaita philosopher Sri Madhvacharya was born.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady?
faq.a: The best time to visit St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady?
faq.a: Stays in St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St Vincent De Paul Church, Katapady?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yenagudde, Udyavara, Mattu, Karnataka, Shankarapura, Kukkikatte.
